source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design the main hoop, front hoop, and diagonal tubes of a rollcage for a closed-cockpit rally car with GVW 1200 kg, delivered as a multi-part assembly because FIA Appendix J Article 253 explicitly enumerates tube families, mount-foot geometry, and bolt counts as separate part families. The assembly consists of (A) main + front hoop tubes (45 OD x 2.5 wall), (B) connecting and diagonal tubes (38 OD x 2.5 wall), (C) six 3 mm thick steel mount-foot plates (>= 120 cm^2 area each), and (D) at least 18 M8-or-larger mount-foot bolts (minimum 3 per foot per Art 253-8.3.2.4).

Article 253 specifies the permitted tubing dimensions (cold-drawn seamless non-alloy carbon steel with <=0.3% C, minimum tensile 350 N/mm^2), the minimum mounting plate size and thickness, the minimum number of bolts at each mounting point, and the FIA homologation load tests (vertical on main hoop, longitudinal on front structure, lateral).

Geometry. Main hoop: single continuous tube of 45 mm OD x 2.5 mm wall. Front hoop: 45 mm OD x 2.5 mm wall. Front-to-main connecting tubes: 38 mm OD x 2.5 mm wall. Diagonal on main hoop: 38 mm OD x 2.5 mm wall. Main hoop height 1350 mm, width at shoulder 1200 mm, wheelbase 2400 mm, front-to-main distance 850 mm. Each of the six mounting feet is a 3 mm thick steel plate of at least 120 cm^2 area, attached by 3 M10 bolts minimum through the plate with bolts in double shear through the chassis rail.

Material. Cold-drawn seamless carbon steel tube, minimum UTS 350 N/mm^2, minimum yield 235 N/mm^2. E = 210 GPa, nu = 0.30, rho = 7850 kg/m^3. Mount plates S235 or equivalent 3 mm thick.

Load cases (FIA homologation quasi-static). LC1 (vertical on main hoop, Art 253-8.3.2.1.1): apply 7.5 * W vertically downward = 88,290 N across a 400 mm loading plate on the main hoop top. LC2 (longitudinal on front structure, Art 253-8.3.2.1.2): 3.5 * W = 41,202 N rearward on front hoop top. LC3 (lateral on main hoop, Art 253-8.3.2.1.3): 3.5 * W = 41,202 N lateral at driver shoulder height. Deformation under each load must not exceed 50 mm.

Pass/fail criteria reproduce FIA Article 253 verbatim and are evaluated on the welded tube + mount-foot + bolt assembly. (R1) LC1 peak max von Mises in any tube <= 235 MPa. (R2) LC2 peak max von Mises <= 235 MPa. (R3) LC3 peak max von Mises <= 235 MPa. (R4) Displacement at loading point under LC1/LC2/LC3 <= 50 mm. (R5) Main and front hoop tubes must match Art 253 permitted OD x wall (45x2.5 or 50x2.0 or 38x2.5). (R6) Each mount foot >= 120 cm^2 plate area, >= 3 mm thick, >= 3 bolts per foot of >= M8. (R7) Total rollcage mass <= 45 kg.

Assembly policy. FIA homologation loads are applied at the main hoop / front hoop and reacted through the mount feet into the chassis. Tube stress, mount-foot compliance, and bolt shear are all coupled; evaluating a single tube or a single mount foot in isolation gives no information about whether the homologation test passes. FEM operates on the full tube+mount+bolt assembly.

Solver and analysis expectations. Primary verification is linear elastic beam- or shell-element FEM for LC1/LC2/LC3 on the full assembly. Mesh beam elements with at least 20 elements per tube between nodes, or 5 mm shell mesh if tubes are modeled as shells. Dynamic rollover simulation is explicitly NOT required. Buckling, modal, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are NOT required.

Deliverables. STEP AP242 of tube centerlines + mount feet + bolts, rollcage total mass in kg, max von Mises per load case in MPa, max deformation per load case in mm, and a geometric compliance table confirming each tube matches a permitted OD x wall row.
short_prompt:
Design the main hoop, front hoop, and diagonal tubes of a rollcage for a closed-cockpit rally car with GVW 1200 kg, delivered as a multi-part welded assembly per FIA Appendix J Article 253. Tubes: cold-drawn seamless non-alloy carbon steel, <= 0.3% C, UTS >= 350 N/mm^2, yield >= 235 N/mm^2, E = 210 GPa, rho = 7850 kg/m^3. Mount plates S235 or equivalent.

Envelope. Main hoop 45 OD x 2.5 wall, single continuous tube, height 1350 mm, shoulder width 1200 mm. Front hoop 45 x 2.5, at 850 mm from main. Connecting + diagonal tubes 38 x 2.5. Wheelbase 2400 mm. Six mount-foot plates >= 120 cm^2, 3 mm thick, each with >= 3 M10 bolts in double shear (rule 253-8.3.2.4).

Load cases per FIA 253-8.3.2.1 homologation quasi-static.
- LC1 vertical on main hoop: 7.5 * W = 88290 N over a 400 mm loading plate.
- LC2 longitudinal on front structure: 3.5 * W = 41202 N rearward on front hoop top.
- LC3 lateral on main hoop: 3.5 * W = 41202 N at driver shoulder height.
Deformation under each <= 50 mm.

Pass limits: tube peak von Mises <= 235 MPa under LC1-LC3; permitted OD x wall is 45 x 2.5, 50 x 2.0, or 38 x 2.5; total rollcage mass <= 45 kg.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Tube OD x wall and mount plate dimensions are binary pass/fail against FIA Article 253 Table.

prompt.title: Rally rollcage main+front hoop assembly per FIA Appendix J Art. 253
prompt.brief: Cold-drawn seamless carbon steel rollcage for 1200 kg GVW rally car; tubes + 6 mount feet + bolts delivered as one assembly; pass 7.5W vertical + 3.5W longitudinal + 3.5W lateral with <=50 mm deformation each.

parts.name: hoop_tube_45x2p5
parts.role: main hoop and front hoop tubes carrying the primary homologation loads

parts.name: mount_foot_plate
parts.role: 3 mm steel plate bolted to chassis rail, reacting hoop loads

parts.name: mount_foot_bolt
parts.role: M8-or-larger bolt in double shear through chassis rail

load_cases.name: lateral_3.5W_main
load_cases.direction: lateral on main hoop shoulder height

boundary_conditions.mount_feet: bolted to chassis, all 6 DOF fixed at bolt holes

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Tube yield Fty 235 MPa; FIA asks for no fracture + <=50 mm permanent set
FIA Art 253-8.3.2.1 homologation: deformation must not exceed 50 mm
Area >=120 cm^2, thickness >=3 mm, bolts >=3 per foot per Art 253-8.3.2.4
Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam or shell on integrated tube + mount + bolt assembly
analysis_types: linear static x3 homologation loads on full cage

interfaces.mediated_by: welded joint (welds within a single fabricated piece allowed)

fem_check_policy.rationale: The FIA homologation loads are applied to the top of the hoop and reacted through the entire tubular frame into the mount feet and bolts. Tube stress, deformation at loading point, and mount compliance are inherently assembly-level.

notes.why_multi_part_is_inherent: Article 253 explicitly enumerates tube families (main/front hoop vs bracing), mount foot plates, and bolt counts as separate regulated part families. The part_class 'rollcage_tubular_frame' is a frame (always-multipart).

exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Local buckling checked implicitly by yield-bounded design of specified tube sizes.

eval_coverage: three FIA quasi-static homologation loads on full tube+mount+bolt assembly
tube OD x wall binary table compliance

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
